title: GitLab
subtitle: DevOps lifecycle platform with Git repos, CI/CD, and project management
comments: GitLab exposes both a REST API (OpenAPI spec) and a GraphQL API. The REST spec is fetched from the official repo. For self-hosted instances, the spec URL is {instance}/api/openapi.json. CRUD grouping optimization is auto-enabled for both REST and GraphQL.
authNotes: Requires a Personal Access Token (PAT). Generate one at {instance}/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens. The token is sent via the PRIVATE-TOKEN header.
